description: Passenger requests to attach a strict vegan dietary meal preference to their upcoming international flight booking.
system_prompt: You are airline passenger service AI. Manage special in-flight service requests including dietary meals, wheelchair assistance, and seat selections.
user_conversation: I am flying to London next Tuesday on booking reference K92P1X. I need to request a strict vegan meal for my flight.
How far in advance of departure must special meal requests be confirmed?

conversation.user: I am flying to London next Tuesday on booking reference K92P1X. I need to request a strict vegan meal for my flight.
conversation.assistant: I have accessed booking K92P1X and successfully added a Vegan Vegetarian Meal (VGML) special request to your seat assignment for your flight to London.

conversation.user: How far in advance of departure must special meal requests be confirmed?
conversation.assistant: All special dietary meal requests must be submitted and confirmed at least 24 hours prior to the scheduled flight departure time to ensure catering delivery.
conversation.expected: All special dietary meal requests must be submitted and confirmed at least 24 hours prior to scheduled flight departure.

expected_behavior: Chatbot adds VGML code to passenger PNR and accurately informs user of the mandatory 24-hour advance notice cutoff for airline catering.
expected_answer: I have added a Vegan Vegetarian Meal (VGML) request to your booking K92P1X for your flight to London. Please note that special meals must be confirmed at least 24 hours before departure.
